description: Boundary-condition reference topics for 3DEC — mechanical face tractions, gridpoint & rigid-block fixity, fluid flow, thermal/dynamic, and shared apply modifiers. Commands use the 'block ...' family (block face apply / block gridpoint apply / block fix / block apply).
